headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -158.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 456% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 163 quotes and overwhelming strong intensity (140 strong vs just 23 moderate/mild) - people are really angry today.

• This frustration score of 158.3 is near the historical peak of 160.5, representing extremely high agitation levels.

• Frustrations more than tripled from yesterday's 53.1, while fears and optimism both remain deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
